name: RABBIT-SPEC-BACKLOG-4
title: affected_files semantics ambiguous: files rabbit-spec touched vs files implementer should touch
description: The impl-suggestion schema's affected_files field is ambiguous. Some impl-suggestions include only source files changed by rabbit-spec (e.g. spec.md). Others include implementer targets (e.g. test/ directories). SKILL.md Step 5 says 'explicit path 1, explicit path 2' without clarifying which category. Clarify in spec.md and SKILL.md whether affected_files means: (a) files rabbit-spec itself wrote, (b) files the TDD subagent should write, or (c) both — with separate arrays.
